description: OpenTools provides an API for LLM tool use, letting applications access hosted MCP-based tools through an OpenAI-compatible completions interface. It also maintains a registry of MCP servers and a CLI for managing MCP server installs for clients like Claude Desktop and Continue.
summary: OpenTools exposes a hosted HTTP completions API at `https://api.opentools.com/v1` authenticated with a bearer API key, plus a Node-based `opentools` CLI for installing and managing MCP servers.
